summary: Iteration 6 Testing Complete - All Chat, Marketplace, and Games features working correctly. Backend: 30/30 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components tested and working.
critical_code_review_comments: Chat system properly implements polling (4s for messages, 8s for conversations)
Chat windows correctly limit to max 3 open at once
Marketplace listings properly filter by category, search, and sort
Marketplace inquiry system sends messages to sellers correctly
Games leaderboard correctly sorted by points descending
Breed Quiz properly hides answers from client and calculates score server-side
Daily checkin correctly prevents duplicate checkins and awards streak-based points
Feed posts correctly sorted by is_promoted then created_at
seed_data_creation: Test marketplace listings created during testing (prefixed with TEST_) - can be cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 major new systems tested and working: 1) Chat System - contacts, conversations, messages, unread count, minimize/close windows, 2) Marketplace - listings CRUD, category/search/sort filters, inquiry modal, my-listings, 3) Games - breed quiz (start/submit), daily checkin, leaderboard. Admin has 25 points (15 from previous + 10 from quiz). Free user has 5 points. Chat widget visible on all pages. Sidebar shows Marketplace and Games links under 'MARKET & PLAY' section.

chat_contacts.notes: Returns list of other users excluding current user

chat_conversations.notes: Returns user's conversations with last message and unread count

chat_create_conversation.notes: Creates or retrieves existing direct conversation, rejects self-chat

chat_messages.notes: Returns messages and marks as read

chat_unread_count.notes: Returns total unread messages across all conversations

marketplace_listings.notes: Returns active listings with category/search/sort filters

marketplace_create_listing.notes: Creates new listing with all fields

marketplace_listing_detail.notes: Returns listing detail with seller info, increments views

marketplace_delete_listing.notes: Deletes own listing, rejects unauthorized delete

games_leaderboard.notes: Returns top players sorted by points descending

games_breed_quiz_start.notes: Starts quiz with 5 random questions, answers hidden

games_breed_quiz_submit.notes: Submits answers, calculates score, awards points (10 per correct)

games_daily_checkin.notes: Checks in and awards streak-based points, rejects duplicate

feed_promoted_posts.notes: Posts sorted by is_promoted then created_at

frontend_chat_widget.notes: Visible at bottom-right, opens contacts panel, chat windows with minimize/close

frontend_marketplace_page.notes: Listings grid, create form, category/search/sort filters, inquiry modal

frontend_games_page.notes: Daily checkin, breed quiz game, leaderboard tab, 4 games displayed
